The four star Amiral Hôtel invites you into a setting that combines charm, sophistication and high tech amenities.
Enjoying a favourable location just a few minutes from Rue Mouffetard and the Latin Quarter, Chinatown and the Butte aux Cailles district, our hotel offers the perfect spot for your stay in Paris.
The City of Lights and its 1001 delights awaits your arrival!
You have of course access to all the activities proposed by the Admiral: swimming pool ...
The hotel is accessible to people with reduced mobility. Several rooms are equipped to their attention.
[BOOK NOW ->](https://www.secure-hotel-booking.com/Hotel-Amiral/JRZT/?language=en)
